'''Tholaz''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tholaz system/Legends|Tholaz system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
